title: orthomene verruculosa
intro: Orthomene verruculosa, also known as the hairy orthomene or hairy Orthomene, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, specifically in the countries of the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion to take advantage of its health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
